zh.Baglan, Glamorgan, Wales: 英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根巴格藍
zh.Avan Wallia, Glamorganshire, Wales: 英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根

zh.Newton, Glamorgan, Wales: 威爾士格拉莫爾根牛頓
zh.lifeSummary: Jenet verch Elidur是Sir Elidur ap Einion的女兒，於大約1170年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根牛頓。她和Morgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradog至少有8個兒子和1個女兒。

zh-hans.Avan Wallia, Glamorganshire, Wales: 英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根
zh-hans.of Glamorgan Co, Wales: 英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根
zh-hans.Newton, Glamorgan, Wales: 威尔士格拉莫爾根牛頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Jenet verch Elidur是Sir Elidur ap Einion的女儿，于大约1170年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根牛頓。她和Morgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradog至少有8个儿子和1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Jenet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: diminutive form of Jeanne, feminine form of Jean ‘John’, now also used in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Jennet
meanings: Either a simplified spelling of   Jeannette   or a revival of a medieval pet form of the female name   Jean .

variants.name: Ginnette
meanings: diminutive form of Jeanne, feminine form of Jean ‘John’, now also used in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Jeanette
meanings: Variant spelling of   Jeannette  , in the 1920s and 30s associated particularly with the Americam singer and film star  Jeanette MacDonald  (  1902–65 ).

variants.name: Jeanett
meanings: diminutive form of Jeanne, feminine form of Jean ‘John’, now also used in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: Jenet verch Elidur was born about 1170, in Newton, Glamorgan, Wales as the daughter of Sir Elidur ap Einion. She had at least 8 sons and 1 daughter with Morgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradog.

fr.Baglan, Glamorgan, Wales: Baglan, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Jenet verch Elidur est née environ 1170, à Newton, Glamorgan, Galles, fille de Sir Elidur ap Einion. Elle a eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille avec Morgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradog.

de.lifeSummary: Jenet verch Elidur wurde um 1170 in Newton, Glamorgan, Wales, als Tochter von Sir Elidur ap Einion geboren. Sie hatte mit Morgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradog mindestens 8 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Jenet verch Elidur è nata il circa 1170 nel Newton, Glamorgan, Galles come figlia di Sir Elidur ap Einion. Lei avuto almeno 8 figli e 1 figlia con Morgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradog.

ja.lifeSummary: Jenet verch Elidurは約1170年にウェールズグラモーガンニュートンでSir Elidur ap Einionの娘として生まれた。彼女はMorgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradogとの間に少なくとも8人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Jenet verch Elidur(은)는 대략 1170년 웨일스 글램르건 뉴턴에서 Sir Elidur ap Einion의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Morgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradog(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Jenet verch Elidur nasceu aproximadamente 1170, em Newton, Glamorgan, Gales filha de Sir Elidur ap Einion. Ela teve pelo menos 8 filhos e 1 filha com Morgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradog.

ro.Baglan, Glamorgan, Wales: Baglan, Glamorgan, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Jenet verch Elidur родилась около 1170 г. в местности нютон, глэморган, Уэльс. Её отца звали Sir Elidur ap Einion. У неё было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь от Morgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradog.

es.lifeSummary: Jenet verch Elidur nació aproximadamente 1170, en Newton, Glamorgan, Gales como hija de Sir Elidur ap Einion. Tuvo por lo menos 8 hijos y 1 hija con Morgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradog.
